region.name: Space / Sophia Nexus (Brickell skyline at dusk)
region.layout_source_note: Filled in by task A2 from the web build's brickell-city.html (provided 2026-07-03). Landmarks, road grid, and the bay water polygon are extracted at a x100 scale (source units to UE centimeters); see the layout file's own _source/_note fields for what is and is not included.

sun.note: Deliberate dusk rebuild per docs/UE5_SHOWPIECE_PLAN.md section 0 (a rebuild, not a port); brickell-city.html itself renders a bright daytime sky, which is intentionally not carried over.

camera_vantage_points.name: establishing_wide
camera_vantage_points.note: Elevated far corner, looking across the skyline and bay toward Brickell City Centre.

camera_vantage_points.name: hero_push_in
camera_vantage_points.note: Push toward Four Seasons Miami, the tallest tower (150m) on the map.

camera_vantage_points.name: slow_reveal
camera_vantage_points.note: Settles on Brickell City Centre, the hub/anchor of the region.
